uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report. Raw signed centi-degC 0x0A5A=2650 -> 26.50. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Decoder port 125, standard path: label Temperature value 26.5).
Synthetic. Raw 0xFE0C=65036 as signed16 = -500 -> -5.00. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (label Temperature value -5).
Synthetic. Raw unsigned centi-% 0x1194=4500 -> 45.00. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (label Humidity value 45).

Synthetic in-bounds atmospheric report. Raw uint16 0x03F3=1011 hPa. DELIBERATE divergence from upstream: reference/upstream-codec.js scales pressure as raw/100 (=> 10.11), a documented upstream bug — a 16-bit value can never reach atmospheric range under /100, and the device's own batch path reports ~1011 hPa. We emit the uint16 directly (vocabulary air.pressure bound 900-1100).
Synthetic. Byte0 0x21 -> endpoint 1 -> CO2 branch. Raw uint16 0x02DA=730 ppm. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (endpoint != 0 -> label CO2 value 730).

uplink.description: VOC standard report (cluster 0x800C, endpoint 0): 34 ppm -> tvoc extra
uplink._note: Synthetic; bytes mirror the TTN codec YAML standard-report VOC example. Byte0 0x11 -> endpoint 0 -> VOC. Raw uint16 0x0022=34. Upstream labels this VOC (no vocabulary CO2/PM key for it) so it is the camelCase extra tvoc (per air-quality category notes). Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (endpoint 0 -> label VOC value 34).
Synthetic. Raw uint16 0x0014=20 lux. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (label Illuminance value 20).
Synthetic. Raw uint16 0x0001=1 (presence). Upstream reports raw Occupancy value 1; normalized to action.motion.detected boolean.

uplink.description: Power configuration report (cluster 0x0050 attr 0x0006): disposable battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Synthetic. Presence flags byte 0x04 (bit2 disposable). mV uint16 0x0E10=3600 -> 3.6 V. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js (label BatteryVoltage value 3.6).

uplink.description: LoRaWAN configuration report (cluster 0x8004 attr 0): message type confirmed -> extra
uplink._note: Synthetic. Value byte 1 -> confirmed. No vocabulary key; surfaced as camelCase extra messageType. Upstream sets message_type='confirmed'.
Byte0 0x10 has bit0 clear -> Watteco proprietary batch frame. This normalized codec decodes only standard reports; batch frames are reported as an error rather than guessed.
Fewer than 6 bytes cannot carry a ZCL cluster/attribute header.
Watteco frames arrive on fPort 125; any other port is rejected.
